title: Icy Tangy Japanese Baby Plum Tomatoes Soba Noodles
description: A refreshing Japanese dish featuring spherified baby plum tomatoes in a tangy sauce, served with soba noodles.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the soba noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix the sodium alginate with a small amount of water to create a solution.
Dip each halved baby plum tomato into the sodium alginate solution, then drop it into the water bath to create spheres.
Let the tomato spheres sit in the water bath for at least 30 minutes to set.
In a blender or food processor, combine the tangy sauce, soy sauce, and a small amount of water to create a smooth sauce.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked soba noodles, tangy sauce, and chopped scallions.
Gently add the tomato spheres to the noodle mixture and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the top of the noodles and serve immediately.
